name: Springerle
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour; measure; add baking powder and sift again.
2. To the well-beaten eggs, gradually add sugar, beating until very thick.
3. Pour boiling water over anise seed and stir into the egg mixture.
4. Stir in the flour. Chill.
5. Roll on a lightly floured board to 1/4 inch thickness; roll again with a springerle roller to create designs.
6. Cut cookies along marked outlines and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Let cool for 6 to 8 hours at room temperature.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 12 to 15 minutes, or until brown.
Makes 4 dozen cookies.
